task_completion.description: UGENE is open and the multi-FASTA file is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE application window is visible with 'reference_proteins.fasta' listed in the project tree or sequence view.
A file manager or terminal shows the 'reports' folder inside '~/UGENE_Data/results/'.

task_completion.description: Protein properties are calculated using UGENE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE's 'Sequence Statistics' or 'Protein Properties' dialog/window is visible, displaying statistics like Molecular Weight and Isoelectric Point for a sequence.

task_completion.description: At least one text report is saved in the reports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager shows a .txt file (e.g., P02768_report.txt) containing the UGENE statistics report inside the 'reports' directory.

task_completion.description: The summary CSV file is created with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application shows 'gel_calibration.csv' with exactly three columns: 'Accession', 'Molecular Weight', and 'Isoelectric Point'.

task_completion.description: The CSV file is populated with the 5 proteins' data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'gel_calibration.csv' file contains 5 rows of data corresponding to the 5 UniProt accession numbers, populated with their respective MW and pI values.

integrity.description: The agent used UGENE's GUI to calculate the properties.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with UGENE's menus and dialogs to compute the statistics, rather than using terminal commands or external scripts.

integrity.description: The agent manually extracted or copy-pasted the data from UGENE to the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent copying data from UGENE and pasting it into a text editor or spreadsheet, or saving reports directly from UGENE.

integrity.description: The agent did not use Python or bash scripts to bypass the UGENE GUI requirement.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running scripts to calculate pI/MW or generate the CSV/reports automatically.
